scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; npm/*) [ "$EAS_BUILD" = "true" ] && exit 0 || (echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.eas-build-pre-install: npm install -g corepack@latest && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.26.1 --activate && NPM_CONFIG_NODE_LINKER=hoisted NPM_CONFIG_SHAMEFULLY_HOIST=true NPM_CONFIG_PUBLIC_HOIST_PATTERN='*' pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && echo '=== ROOT node_modules (expo packages) ===' && ls node_modules 2>/dev/null | grep -i ^expo || echo 'NO EXPO AT ROOT' && echo '=== saas-mobile node_modules ===' && ls artifacts/saas-mobile/node_modules 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'no saas-mobile nm'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
